---
toc: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="profile-header">
  <div class="profile-info">
    <div class="profile-name">Suraj Jaiswal</div>
    <div class="profile-links">
      <a href="mailto:jaiswalsuraj487@gmail.com"><i class="bi bi-envelope-at-fill"></i> Email</a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/surajjaiswal007/"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/jaiswalsuraj487"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> Github</a>
      <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=560LfBoAAAAJ&hl=en"><i class="bi bi-google-scholar"></i> Google Scholar</a>
    </div>
    <p><strong>Senior AI Engineer · GenAI &amp; NLP · Computer Vision · Published at NeurIPS &amp; ACM</strong></p>
    <p>Open to Senior AI/ML Engineer, NLP Engineer, and Applied Scientist roles. Check out my <a href="https://jaiswalsuraj487.github.io/resume/Suraj_Jaiswal_Resume.pdf">Resume</a> or reach out directly.</p>
  </div>
  <img src="images/profile_photo.jpg" class="profile-photo">
</div>
```

---

**Currently:** Senior AI/ML Associate at [Tiger Analytics](https://www.tigeranalytics.com/)

- Architected a **multi-agent AI interview orchestrator** (LangChain + LangGraph) with real-time routing, phase-specific question generation, and async FastAPI + WebSocket backend
- Deployed a **GenAI Bill-of-Materials pipeline** (AWS Bedrock + MLflow + Docker) — reduced manual generation time by **80%**
- Built an **LLM code evaluator** improving throughput by **3×** and cutting manual review time by **90%**
- Built a real-time **safety monitoring pipeline** (CCTV/RTSP + AWS IoT Core) with **~100ms** latency

**Previously:** NLP Engineer at [Neuroreef Lab](https://www.linkedin.com/company/neuroreef-labs/)

- Developed [CareCortex](https://carecortex.ai/) — an AI copilot for real-time medical note-taking using fine-tuned OpenAI LLMs
- Built a **RAG system** to autogenerate ICD-10, CPT, SNOMED, and HCC codes for medical billing
- Implemented a medical chatbot using **HyDE + RAG** over Athena EHR data

**Research:** M.Tech at [IIT Gandhinagar](https://iitgn.ac.in/), advised by [Dr. Nipun Batra](https://nipunbatra.github.io/)

- Detected and classified **30,638 brick kilns** across 5 Indian states using YOLO-OBB on Planet Labs satellite imagery — **82% precision** over **520,000 km²**
- Published at **NeurIPS 2023** (best paper nominee), **ACM Compass 2024**, and **ACM Journal 2025**

---

## Skills

**GenAI / NLP**
`LangChain` `LangGraph` `RAG` `HyDE` `OpenAI API` `HuggingFace` `Prompt Engineering` `Fine-tuning`

**ML / Computer Vision**
`PyTorch` `TensorFlow` `Scikit-learn` `YOLOv8` `YOLOX` `YOLO-OBB` `GroundingDINO` `OCSort` `Active Learning`

**Backend / MLOps / Infra**
`FastAPI` `WebSocket` `Docker` `MLflow` `AWS (S3, EC2, Bedrock, ECR, IoT Core)` `Boto3` `GitHub Actions`

**Languages & Tools**
`Python` `SQL` `C` `Streamlit` `Leafmap` `Git`
